title: coincya cheiranthos subsp. montana
intro: Coincya cheiranthos subsp. montana, also known as mountain rocket, is a flowering plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It is native to the mountainous regions of the Iberian Peninsula and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Coincya cheiranthos subsp. montana can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
